overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk through a rainy upscale residential neighborhood. The player character walks along wet streets illuminated by street lamps, enters a modern luxury home's driveway, and approaches parked sports cars in the driveway.

events.description: black sedan passes by on the left side of the street
white car drives past on the right side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking down a wet residential street at night, approaching a stop sign at an intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: tall white stucco wall with manicured hedge on top
tall street lamp casting warm yellow light on wet pavement
red octagonal stop sign at the intersection ahead
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet residential street at night, with the camera walking forward past white concrete walls and hedges. Street lamps cast warm reflections on the rain-slicked asphalt as vehicles occasionally pass by. The camera approaches a stop sign at an intersection, with palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated driveway entrance of luxury home

events.description: turns right off the public street into a private driveway
exterior lights of the modern house become visible, illuminating the driveway

agents.ego_description: turning right into a gated driveway and walking toward a modern luxury residence

entered.detail: two-story modern white residence with large illuminated windows and flat roof
stone pillar with light fixture marking the driveway entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a private driveway, leaving the street behind. A modern white luxury house with illuminated windows comes into view ahead, flanked by landscaped hedges and stone gate pillars. The driveway surface transitions to patterned paving stones, still wet from the rain.

events.description: driveway curves to the left as it approaches the house and garage area
garage with glass doors comes into view, revealing two parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved driveway approaching the house garage and parked vehicles

entered.detail: modern garage with dark tinted glass panel doors and white frame
sleek white two-door sports car with black roof parked in driveway
dark colored luxury sedan parked next to the white sports car

segments.scene_description: Continuing up the curved driveway, the camera approaches the house's garage area. The modern white house shifts to the left as the garage with glass doors becomes the focal point. Two luxury cars—a white sports car and a black sedan—are parked in front of the garage, illuminated by exterior wall lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: driveway parking area with luxury vehicles

events.description: approaches and circles around the white sports car to inspect it from multiple angles
moves from the white car toward the black car parked nearby

agents.ego_description: circling around the parked white sports car examining its details, then moving toward the black car

entered.detail: wall-mounted exterior lights illuminating the house facade and driveway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to the white sports car, circling around it to show details of its sleek design and wet surface reflections. After inspecting the white car, the camera shifts toward the black sedan, with the house's exterior stairs and entrance visible in the background. The driveway's patterned paving and exterior lighting create a luxurious atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-slicked public street into the private, illuminated grounds of a luxury estate. It begins by walking along a wet residential road past white concrete walls and hedges, where street lamps cast warm reflections on the asphalt. As the camera reaches an intersection marked by a stop sign and distant palm trees, it turns right into a private driveway, transitioning from the open street to patterned paving stones flanked by stone gate pillars. The scene then opens up to reveal a modern white luxury house with glowing windows, shifting focus toward a glass-doored garage as the camera curves inward. Finally, the movement slows to circle a sleek white sports car and a black sedan, capturing the wet reflections of the vehicles under the house's exterior lighting.
